name: Baked Stuffed Peaches
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, ground almonds, and amaretti.
2. Gradually stir in the beaten egg, adding just enough egg so the mixture holds together; do not let it become too wet to hold its shape.
3. Form the mixture into 12 balls, approximately the size of walnuts.
4. Butter a shallow baking dish. Halve the peaches and remove the pits, placing the halves cut-side up in the dish.
5. Press a ball of the almond mixture into the cavity of each peach half. Dot the tops with butter, and drizzle marsala over all.
6. Bake at 190°C for approximately 30 minutes until the almond mixture is golden and crusty. Serve warm or chilled.
Difficulty: easy
Precision: measure ingredients
